## Checklist
- [ ] Built at least one platform locally (`npm run build:mac/win/linux`)
- [ ] No signing certs, tokens, or `.env` values added to the diff
- [ ] If bumping version: also tag `runner-v<version>` to trigger CI release
- [ ] No new native deps added without discussion
